label: Mental Health
description: Suicidal ideation, severe anxiety, panic attacks, and mental health crises
steps: You are not alone — reach out to a crisis helpline now
Call KIRAN Mental Health Helpline at 9152987821
Stay with someone you trust or ask them to stay with you
Remove immediate means of self-harm from your surroundings
Breathe slowly — help is available and recovery is possible
guidance: Crisis feelings are temporary — speaking to someone helps
iCall emotional support is available at 9152987821
If in immediate danger, call 112 for emergency intervention
Professional counseling is confidential and non-judgmental
